args.text: Confirming ownership of incident TCK-2201: duplicate-charge fault from 12 May billing batch run, root cause disabled double_charge_guard in billing-config.json. Taking this through to resolution.
Guard fix confirmed live: billing-api deployed at v3.4.1 with double_charge_guard=true.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: Three orders were overcharged by the 12 May billing batch duplicate-charge fault (root cause: disabled double_charge_guard). Fix deployed as billing-api v3.4.1. Refunds issued: ORD-5501 $19.99, ORD-5502 $19.99, ORD-5503 $39.98 (total $79.96). Affected customers have been notified. Full details in refunds-summary.md.
